/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/vulkan_app_example.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o bin/vulkan_app_example  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib lib/libvulkan_app.a lib/libglm.a lib/libimgui_backend.a lib/libglfw3.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation /usr/local/lib/libvulkan.dylib
